headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Slip As Inflation Jitters Meet Rate Relief
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Apr, 10 2026 US stock futures are slightly softer this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 contracts dipping about 0.1%, as investors weigh hotter inflation signals against some relief on borrowing costs. Markets expect March consumer prices to sit near 3.3% overall, with a 0.9% monthly rise and core inflation around 2.7%, which means the cost of living is still climbing faster than many would like. At the same time, 30 year mortgage...
